controls.control_objective: To ensure 5, 2016 for comments
controls.control_description:
Based on the experience of licensing two universal banks in 2014 and that of granting
in-principle approvals for Small Finance Banks and Payments Banks, the Reserve
Bank released the 'Draft Guidelines for 'on tap' Licensing of Universal Banks in the
Private Sector' on May 5, 2016 for comments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 5, 2016 for comments

controls.control_objective: To ensure , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes
controls.control_description:
'Promoter' means, the person who together with his relatives [as defined in Section
2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his
ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank /
NOFHC, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form part of the
Promoter Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes

controls.control_objective: To ensure any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control
controls.control_description:
<image>
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the
form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity that promotes the bank
controls.control_description: 'Promoting entity' means the entity that promotes the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity that promotes the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst
controls.control_description:
Provided that a financial institution, scheduled commercial bank, foreign institutional
investor or mutual fund shall not be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of
the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by
such institution unless such investment is strategic in nature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst

controls.control_objective: To ensure if such entity / group has total assets of ₹5000 crore or more, the non-financial business of the group does not account for 40% or more in terms of t
controls.control_description:
Entities / groups in the private sector that are 'owned and controlled by residents'
[as defined in FEMA Rules and Regulations, as amended from time to time] and
have a successful track record for at least 10 years, provided that if such entity /
group has total assets of ₹5000 crore or more, the non-financial business of the
group does not account for 40% or more in terms of total assets / in terms of gross
income.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to if such entity / group has total assets of ₹5000 crore or more, the non-financial business of the group does not account for 40% or more in terms of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by chapter ii of this guidelines
controls.control_description:
Small Finance Banks, which are desirous of voluntarily transiting into Universal
Bank, shall be guided by Chapter II of this Guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by chapter ii of this guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible to promote banks
controls.control_description:
The Promoters / Promoter Groups should be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible
to promote banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible to promote banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum 10 years of experience in banking and finance at a senior level
controls.control_description:
(i) Each of the Promoters should have a minimum 10 years of experience
in banking and finance at a senior level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum 10 years of experience in banking and finance at a senior level

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a past record of sound credentials and integrity
controls.control_description:
(ii) The Promoters should have a past record of sound credentials and
integrity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a past record of sound credentials and integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be financially sound and should have a successful track record for at least 10 years
controls.control_description:
(iii) The Promoters should be financially sound and should have a successful
track record for at least 10 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be financially sound and should have a successful track record for at least 10 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum 10 years of experience in running its / their businesses
controls.control_description:
(i) The promoting entity / promoter group should have a minimum 10 years
of experience in running its / their businesses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum 10 years of experience in running its / their businesses

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a past record of sound credentials and integrity
controls.control_description:
(ii) The promoting entity and the promoter group should have a past record
of sound credentials and integrity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a past record of sound credentials and integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be financially sound and should have a successful track record for at least 10 years
controls.control_description:
(iii) The promoting entity and the promoter group should be financially sound
and should have a successful track record for at least 10 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be financially sound and should have a successful track record for at least 10 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure move to the nofhc structure
controls.control_description:
However, in case other group
entities are proposed to be established after the bank is incorporated, the bank
should move to the NOFHC structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to move to the nofhc structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the rbi
controls.control_description:
(2) In case the proposal is for setting up / conversion into a bank, any change in
shareholding within the promoting / converting entity from the date of
application to the RBI as a result of which a shareholder acquires or transfers
five per cent or more of the voting equity capital of the promoting / converting
entity, shall be reported to the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set up only through a nofhc
controls.control_description:
Structure with NOFHC
(1) In case the individual promoters / promoting entities / converting entities have
other group entities, the bank shall be set up only through a NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set up only through a nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non- operative financial holding company) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The bank
shall be guided by the instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Operative Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non- operative financial holding company) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹1,000 crore
controls.control_description:
Minimum Capital and Other Requirements
(1) The initial minimum paid-up voting equity share capital/ net worth for a bank
shall be ₹1,000 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹1,000 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹1,000 crore at all times
controls.control_description:
Thereafter, the bank shall have a minimum net worth of
₹1,000 crore at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹1,000 crore at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹1,000 crore at all times
controls.control_description:
(2) In cases of conversion of NBFCs into banks, the converting entity, and
thereafter the bank, shall have a minimum net worth of ₹1,000 crore at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹1,000 crore at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 13 per cent of its risk weighted assets (rwa) for a minimum period of three years after th
controls.control_description:
(3) The bank shall be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 13
per cent of its risk weighted assets (RWA) for a minimum period of three years
after the commencement of its operations subject to any higher percentage as
may be prescribed by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 13 per cent of its risk weighted assets (rwa) for a minimum period of three years after th

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain capital adequacy on a consolidated basis as per basel norms applicable to the entity
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall maintain capital
adequacy on a consolidated basis as per Basel norms applicable to the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain capital adequacy on a consolidated basis as per basel norms applicable to the entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure get its shares listed on the stock exchanges within six years of the commencement of business by the bank
controls.control_description:
(4) The bank shall get its shares listed on the stock exchanges within six years of
the commencement of business by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get its shares listed on the stock exchanges within six years of the commencement of business by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as prescribed by the respective sectoral regulators
controls.control_description:
(5) The capital requirements for the regulated financial services entities held by the
NOFHC shall be as prescribed by the respective sectoral regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as prescribed by the respective sectoral regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank which shall be locked-in for a period of five years from the date
controls.control_description:
Pattern of Shareholding
(1) The promoter/s and the promoter group / NOFHC, as the case may be, shall
hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the
bank which shall be locked-in for a period of five years from the date of
commencement of business of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank which shall be locked-in for a period of five years from the date

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution and the lock-in period of five years will apply to 26 per cent promoter shareholding
controls.control_description:
(2) If the existing entities have diluted the promoter shareholding to below 40 per
cent, but above 26 per cent, due to regulatory requirements or otherwise, RBI
may not insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution and the lock-in
period of five years will apply to 26 per cent promoter shareholding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution and the lock-in period of five years will apply to 26 per cent promoter shareholding

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to hold 40 per cent of the enhanced voting equity share capital of the bank for a period of five years from the date of commencement of busin
controls.control_description:
(3) In the event of the bank raising further voting equity share capital during the
first five years from the date of commencement of business, the promoter/s and
promoter group / NOFHC should continue to hold 40 per cent of the enhanced
voting equity share capital of the bank for a period of five years from the date
of commencement of business of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to hold 40 per cent of the enhanced voting equity share capital of the bank for a period of five years from the date of commencement of busin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought down to 26 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank within a period of 15 years
controls.control_description:
(4) The shareholding by promoter/s and promoter group / NOFHC shall be brought
down to 26 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank within
a period of 15 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought down to 26 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank within a period of 15 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a dilution schedule, which will be examined and approved by the rbi
controls.control_description:
(5) At the time of issue of licences, the promoter shall submit a dilution schedule,
which will be examined and approved by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a dilution schedule, which will be examined and approved by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically reported by the banks and will be monitored by rbi
controls.control_description:
The progress in achieving
these agreed milestones must be periodically reported by the banks and will be
monitored by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically reported by the banks and will be monitored by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
The limits
on shareholding, as prescribed in Annex-I of the Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights)
Directions, 2025 shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure have controlling interest in the bank
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, individuals and companies,
directly or indirectly connected with large industrial houses are permitted to
participate in the equity of a new private sector bank up to 10 per cent and shall
not have controlling interest in the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have controlling interest in the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> have any director on the board of the bank on account of shareholder agreements or otherwise
controls.control_description:
However, such shareholders shall not
<image>
have any Director on the Board of the bank on account of shareholder
agreements or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> have any director on the board of the bank on account of shareholder agreements or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, foreign exchange management act, 1999, payment and
controls.control_description:
The bank shall be governed by the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949,
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999,
Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, Credit Information Companies
(Regulation) Act, 2005, Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation Act,
1961, other relevant Statutes and the Directives, Prudential regulations and other
Guidelines / Instructions issued by RBI and other regulators from time to time,
including the regulations of SEBI regarding public issues and other guidelines
applicable to listed banking companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, foreign exchange management act, 1999, payment and

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of banking regulations act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(i) The bank shall comply with the provisions of Banking Regulations Act,
1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of banking regulations act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the extant regulatory guidelines on corporate governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, nomination committee, remuneration committee
controls.control_description:
(ii) The bank shall comply with the extant regulatory guidelines on corporate
governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, Nomination Committee,
Remuneration Committee, prudential norms on income recognition and
asset classification, valuations of investments, liquidity management,
etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the extant regulatory guidelines on corporate governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, nomination committee, remuneration committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the extant cross holding norms
controls.control_description:
(iii) The bank's investments in equity / debt capital instruments of other
banks / financial institutions and debt capital instruments of other
NOFHCs should be guided by the extant cross holding norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the extant cross holding norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the applicable corporate governance guidelines, prudential norms and exposure norms on a solo as well as consolidated basis as indicated i
controls.control_description:
For a bank with NOFHC
(1) In case the group structure envisages creation of an NOFHC, the NOFHC, the
bank held under NOFHC and financial entities (other than bank) held by the
NOFHC shall comply with the applicable corporate governance guidelines,
prudential norms and exposure norms on a solo as well as consolidated basis
as indicated in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Operative Financial Holding
Company) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the applicable corporate governance guidelines, prudential norms and exposure norms on a solo as well as consolidated basis as indicated i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be realistic and viable
controls.control_description: The business plan submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be realistic and viable

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary
controls.control_description:
In case
of deviation from the stated business plan after issue of licence, RBI may consider
restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing
other penal measures as may be necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of a project report covering various aspects as indicated in annex i
controls.control_description:
The business plan should comprise of a project report covering various
aspects as indicated in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to comprise of a project report covering various aspects as indicated in annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be "controlled by residents" (as per fema, 1999 and as amended from time to time) at all times
controls.control_description:
The bank should be "controlled by residents" (as per FEMA, 1999 and as amended
from time to time) at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be "controlled by residents" (as per fema, 1999 and as amended from time to time) at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 and the instructions issued by rbi from time to time <image> in this regard
controls.control_description:
The composition of the Board of the bank should comply with the provisions of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the instructions issued by RBI from time to time
<image>
in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 and the instructions issued by rbi from time to time <image> in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a majority of independent directors, as defined in the companies act, 2013)
controls.control_description:
The Board of the bank should have a majority of independent
directors, as defined in the Companies Act, 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a majority of independent directors, as defined in the companies act, 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain arm's length relationship with promoter / promoter group entities, and the major suppliers and major customers of these entities
controls.control_description:
The bank shall maintain arm's length relationship with Promoter / Promoter Group
entities, and the major suppliers and major customers of these entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain arm's length relationship with promoter / promoter group entities, and the major suppliers and major customers of these entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the priority sector lending targets and sub-targets as applicable to the existing domestic banks
controls.control_description:
The bank shall comply with the priority sector lending targets and sub-targets as
applicable to the existing domestic banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the priority sector lending targets and sub-targets as applicable to the existing domestic banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure build its priority sector lending portfolio from the commencement of its operations
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the bank should build
its priority sector lending portfolio from the commencement of its operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to build its priority sector lending portfolio from the commencement of its operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure open at least 25 per cent of its branches in unbanked rural centres (population up to 9,999 as per the latest census) to avoid over concentration of t
controls.control_description:
The bank shall open at least 25 per cent of its branches in unbanked rural centres
(population up to 9,999 as per the latest census) to avoid over concentration of
their branches in metropolitan areas and cities which are already having adequate
banking presence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open at least 25 per cent of its branches in unbanked rural centres (population up to 9,999 as per the latest census) to avoid over concentration of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully networked and technology driven from the beginning with all modern infrastructural facilities
controls.control_description:
The bank should be fully networked and technology driven from the beginning with
all modern infrastructural facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully networked and technology driven from the beginning with all modern infrastructural facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints
controls.control_description:
The bank should have a high powered Customer Grievances Cell to handle
customer complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued on a very selective basis to those who conform to the above requirements, who have an impeccable track record and who are likely to conform
controls.control_description:
Banking being a highly leveraged business, licences shall be issued on a very
selective basis to those who conform to the above requirements, who have an
impeccable track record and who are likely to conform to the best international and
domestic standards of customer service and efficiency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued on a very selective basis to those who conform to the above requirements, who have an impeccable track record and who are likely to conform

controls.control_objective: To ensure be possible for rbi to issue licences to all the applicants just meeting the eligibility criteria prescribed above
controls.control_description:
Therefore, it may not be
possible for RBI to issue licences to all the applicants just meeting the eligibility
criteria prescribed above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be possible for rbi to issue licences to all the applicants just meeting the eligibility criteria prescribed above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, should comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines
controls.control_description:
Under both the options, the NOFHC / the bank or both, as the case may be, should
comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be, should comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC and the bank set up under it should
comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with all the requirements laid down in the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted through pravaah in the prescribed form (form iii)
controls.control_description:
In terms of Rule 11 of the Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949
applications shall be submitted through PRAVAAH in the prescribed form (Form
III).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted through pravaah in the prescribed form (form iii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the requisite information as per the annex i
controls.control_description:
In addition, the applicants should furnish the requisite information as per
the Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the requisite information as per the annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also furnish a plan and methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines
controls.control_description:
The applicant should also furnish a plan and methodologies they
would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also furnish a plan and methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be addressed to: the chief general manager, department of regulation, reserve bank of india, central office, central office building, shahid bhagat si
controls.control_description:
Applications for setting up banks in the private sector, along with other details as
mentioned above, should be addressed to:
The Chief General Manager,
Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India, Central Office,
Central Office Building,
Shahid Bhagat Singh Road, Mumbai-400001
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be addressed to: the chief general manager, department of regulation, reserve bank of india, central office, central office building, shahid bhagat si

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit and proper' criteria prescribed in paragraph 11
controls.control_description:
RBI may apply
additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit
and proper' criteria prescribed in Paragraph 11.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit and proper' criteria prescribed in paragraph 11

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required by it
controls.control_description:
The Committee will reserve the right
to call for more information as well as have discussions with any applicant/s and
seek clarification on any issue as may be required by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose additional conditions and if warranted, it may withdraw the in-principle approval
controls.control_description:
After issue of the in-principle approval for setting up of a bank, if any adverse
features are noticed subsequently regarding the Promoters or the companies /
entities with which the Promoters are associated and the group in which they have
interest, the RBI may impose additional conditions and if warranted, it may
withdraw the in-principle approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose additional conditions and if warranted, it may withdraw the in-principle approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue as a differentiated bank
controls.control_description:
Background:
The small finance bank may continue as a differentiated bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue as a differentiated bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the sfb's fulfilling minimum paid-up capital/ net worth requirement as applicable to universal banks, satisfactory track record of perfo
controls.control_description:
Such conversion shall be subject to the SFB's
fulfilling minimum paid-up capital/ net worth requirement as applicable to Universal
Banks, satisfactory track record of performance as an SFB for a minimum period of
five years and RBI's due diligence exercise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the sfb's fulfilling minimum paid-up capital/ net worth requirement as applicable to universal banks, satisfactory track record of perfo

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been listed on a recognised stock exchange
controls.control_description: (2) shares of the bank should have been listed on a recognised stock exchange;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been listed on a recognised stock exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable with regard to shareholding pattern: (1) there is no mandatory requirement for an eligible sfb to have an identified promoter
controls.control_description:
The following conditions shall be applicable with regard to shareholding pattern:
(1) There is no mandatory requirement for an eligible SFB to have an identified
promoter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable with regard to shareholding pattern: (1) there is no mandatory requirement for an eligible sfb to have an identified promoter

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue as the promoters on transition to universal bank
controls.control_description:
However, the existing promoters of the eligible SFB, if any, shall
continue as the promoters on transition to Universal Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue as the promoters on transition to universal bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted for an eligible sfb while transitioning to universal bank
controls.control_description:
(2) Addition of new promoters or change in promoters shall not be permitted for an
eligible SFB while transitioning to Universal Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted for an eligible sfb while transitioning to universal bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no new mandatory lock-in requirement of minimum shareholding for existing promoters in the transitioned universal bank
controls.control_description:
(3) There shall be no new mandatory lock-in requirement of minimum shareholding
for existing promoters in the transitioned Universal Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no new mandatory lock-in requirement of minimum shareholding for existing promoters in the transitioned universal bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no change to the promoter shareholding dilution plan already approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) There shall be no change to the promoter shareholding dilution plan already
approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no change to the promoter shareholding dilution plan already approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to furnish a detailed rationale for such transition
controls.control_description: The eligible SFB shall be required to furnish a detailed rationale for such transition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be required to furnish a detailed rationale for such transition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed in accordance with the chapter i of this guideline
controls.control_description:
The application for transition from SFB to Universal Bank shall be assessed in
accordance with the Chapter I of this Guideline.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed in accordance with the chapter i of this guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to all the norms including nofhc structure (as applicable) as per the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) dir
controls.control_description:
Further, on transition the bank
shall be subjected to all the norms including NOFHC structure (as applicable) as
per the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Operative Financial Holding Company)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to all the norms including nofhc structure (as applicable) as per the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application for transition to universal bank, through pravaah, in the prescribed form (form iii) in terms of rule 11 of the banking regulat
controls.control_description:
The eligible SFB may submit its application for transition to Universal Bank, through
PRAVAAH, in the prescribed form (Form III) in terms of Rule 11 of the Banking
Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949, along with other requisite documents,
addressed to The Chief General Manager, Department of Regulation, Reserve
Bank of India, Central Office, Central Office Building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Road,
Mumbai - 400001.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application for transition to universal bank, through pravaah, in the prescribed form (form iii) in terms of rule 11 of the banking regulat

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish detailed information about the persons/entities, who would subscribe to five per cent or more of the paid-up equity share capital <image> (sha
controls.control_description:
The applicants should furnish detailed information about the persons/entities, who
would subscribe to five per cent or more of the paid-up equity share capital
<image>
(shareholding pattern) of the proposed bank/ NOFHC, including foreign equity
participation in the proposed bank/ NOFHC as per the Form A of the Reserve Bank
of India (Commercial Banks - Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish detailed information about the persons/entities, who would subscribe to five per cent or more of the paid-up equity share capital <image> (sha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished as per the aforesaid directions
controls.control_description:
Also, the sources of capital of the above major shareholders
along with details regarding their significant beneficial ownership, if any, shall be
furnished as per the aforesaid directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished as per the aforesaid directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure give as much concrete details as feasible, based on adequate ground level information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections
controls.control_description:
The project report
should give as much concrete details as feasible, based on adequate ground level
information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give as much concrete details as feasible, based on adequate ground level information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections

controls.control_objective: To ensure address how the bank proposes to achieve financial inclusion and in the case of an nbfc applicant, how the existing lending business will fold into th
controls.control_description:
The business
plan should address how the bank proposes to achieve financial inclusion and in
the case of an NBFC applicant, how the existing lending business will fold into the
bank or divested / disposed of.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address how the bank proposes to achieve financial inclusion and in the case of an nbfc applicant, how the existing lending business will fold into th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given
controls.control_description:
Explanation 1: Business plan should, inter alia, include (but not limited to), the
underlying assumptions, the existing infrastructure/ network/ branches, and the
proposed product lines, target clientele, target locations, usage of technology, risk
management, plans relating to human resources, branch network, alternative
points of presence, opening of branches in unbanked rural areas, priority sector
compliance, financial projections for five years, etc
Explanation 2: In case of NBFC applicants, information on existing CRR / SLR
requirement, projected CRR / SLR requirement and plan for compliance with
statutory norms on CRR / SLR may be given.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish any other relevant information and documents supporting the applications
controls.control_description:
The Promoters may furnish any other relevant information and documents
supporting the applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish any other relevant information and documents supporting the applications

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for any other additional information, as may be required, in due course
controls.control_description:
Further, the RBI may call for any other additional
information, as may be required, in due course.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for any other additional information, as may be required, in due course

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto
controls.control_description: (Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the same, in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction, etc., and not on merit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned)
controls.control_description: If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are pending, the same also should be mentioned).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned)
